title: Day 3 Lesson 1 ( Video )Giving information
html:
Day ３ - Lesson 1

しんにゅうせいを　あんないする = Giving information to the new student

ばしょ (Location): がっこうのまえ　= In front of the school

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): じむいん (Clerk), あんなさん しんゆうせい (Anna-san new student)

The new words you find in this lesson are:

ここは (koko wa) = here

そこは (soko wa) = there

あそこは (asoko wa) = over there

ちゅうりんじょ (chuurinjo) = park space for bicycles

きつえんじょう (kitsuenjou) = smoking area

どうぞ (douzo) = please

はい、わかりました (hai, wakarimashita) = yes, I understand
